339 S Paddock St, Pontiac, MI 48342, USA
Not sure if this is Bing, but there are several cherry trees right behind the community garden beds and circular healing garden. Access: Public.

A few apple trees- fruit available late August to September. They're small and frequently wasp-ridden, but I harvested a great number once and made apple butter. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
4905 Sashabaw Rd, Village of Clarkston, MI 48346, USA

One of each tree. On someone's property but you can sneak by and grab one. Pears are the best I've tasted all season. Apples a green and lightly tart, not very edible quite yet. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
